objective: Faster, accurate claim settlement across B2C, B2B, B2E channels.
main_kpi: Claims cycle time (FNOL → settlement); STP rate; loss-adjustment expense

tab_content.Overview: Web Claim Submission supports Claim Intake in Claims.

tab_content.KPIs: Claims cycle time (FNOL → settlement); STP rate; loss-adjustment expense

tab_content.Governance: Tenant-scoped, role-scoped, PII-redacted by default, and audited per decision.

tab_content.Overview: Subrogation Recovery supports Closeout & Audit in Claims.

tab_content.AI: Relevant AI agents: Claim Intake Agent, Claim Assessment Agent, Claim Validation Agent, Claim Triage Agent.
